headline: Apple’s new parental controls are for keeping Apple out of trouble
summary: Apple introduced new parental controls at WWDC to manage kids' online experiences. The updates aim to fine-tune screen time and avoid excessive usage. This move is also seen as a defensive strategy amid internet regulation debates.

headline: OpenAI files for IPO, following Anthropic
summary: OpenAI has confidentially filed a Form S-1 with the SEC for its initial public offering. This follows rival Anthropic's similar filing on June 1st. The move marks a significant step in the ongoing IPO race between the AI companies.

headline: 44 things coming to your Apple devices that you might have missed
summary: WWDC 2024 focused heavily on Apple Intelligence and Siri AI. Many smaller, cool features across new OS updates were overlooked or briefly mentioned. This article rounds up 44 such features coming to Apple devices.

headline: Apple drops support for a long list of Apple Watches and iPads with latest OS updates
summary: Apple's latest watchOS 27 and iPadOS 27 updates will not run on many older devices. This year, Apple is culling support for more device generations than ever before. Users with non-modern Apple Watches or iPads will be affected.

headline: This $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is Just $385 Shipped at Wayfair After an 80% Off Discount
summary: An $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair is now available for just $385. The chair is being offered at an 80% discount. This deal is available on Wayfair with shipping included.

headline: The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Noise Canceling Headphones Drops to a New Price Low for Father's Day
summary: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Noise Canceling Headphones have reached a new lowest price. The discount is part of a Father's Day promotion. These headphones are praised for having no equal in their sub-$200 category.

headline: Save 40% Off the Gamesir G7 Pro, The Best Wireless PC Gaming Controller Under $100
summary: The Gamesir G7 Pro, touted as the best wireless PC gaming controller under $100, is now 40% off. Originally priced at $80, it's available for $48. This deal can be found on AliExpress.

headline: The White-Colored Gigabyte Radeon RX 9070 XT 16GB Graphics Card Drops to $649.99 on Amazon
summary: The white Gigabyte Radeon RX 9070 XT 16GB graphics card is now on sale. It has dropped to a price of $649.99. This GPU is perfect for an all-white themed PC build.

headline: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
summary: David Sullivan, West Ham co-owner, faces accusations of abusing his power. Women allege he demanded sex in exchange for features in his newspapers. The claims point to a pattern of exploitative behavior.

headline: Who is David Sullivan - football boss, 'king of porn' and alleged sexual predator?
summary: David Sullivan, former West Ham boss, is now accused of exploitative sexual behavior. He has a long history of boasting about his sexual conquests. The article delves into his background amidst these serious allegations.

headline: Sikh group calls for inquiry into Henry Nowak death
summary: The Sikh Federation has formally requested a government inquiry. The inquiry pertains to the death of Henry Nowak. Dabinderjit Singh of the Federation has written to the government regarding this matter.

headline: New drug to stop 'Ozempic butt' muscle loss
summary: A new drug is being developed to combat muscle loss, commonly referred to as 'Ozempic butt'. Experts indicate that up to a third of weight lost from obesity jabs can be muscle. The medication aims to mitigate this specific side effect.
